news.t: Healthcare Services Stocks Positioned for Move Higher
Health Care Services and Equipment Stocks Poised for Gains

holdings.infoBox: XHS is an equity ETF with a total of 59 individual holdings. The top holdings are Humana stock at 3.71%, Clover Health Investments at 3.56%, Centene at 3.04%, BrightSpring Health Services at 2.56%, and Progyny at 2.54%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Health Care Services ETF (XHS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of US health care services companies, as defined by GICS. XHS was launched on Sep 28, 2011 and is issued by State Street.
infoTable: S&P Health Care Services Select Industry

data.title: Healthcare Services Stocks Positioned for Move Higher
data.text: Bullish charts across the healthcare services subsector suggest that this niche segment could be the one to watch over the months ahead.

data.title: Health Care Services and Equipment Stocks Poised for Gains
data.text: While most attention in health care has been going to large pharma companies, the charts suggest opportunities in niche subsectors.
